tasks.instruction: Uzupełnij poniższe wypowiedzi (1.1.–1.6.), wybierając spośród podanych możliwości. Zakreśl literę A, B albo C.

items.prompt: A: I'm not sure I can come to the party tonight. B: Oh, come on! Don't let us _______. We're counting on you.
A: How did the exam go? B: It was a _______ of cake. I finished in twenty minutes.
A: Should I tell him the truth? B: Yes, it's better to _______ the bullet and get it over with.
A: We need to make a decision soon. B: Let's not jump the _______. We still have time to think.
A: What do you think about moving abroad? B: To be _______, I have mixed feelings about it.
A: I can't solve this puzzle. B: Don't worry, once you see the trick, it'll ring a _______ and become obvious.
